name: Charles Park
description: The City of Vero Beach Recreation Department offers free tennis courts that have lines for pickle ball at Charles Park.

name: Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
description: Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Vero Beach, FL. There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the court. Amenities include restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons. The court is private.
fees: Private — No cost to play here

name: Indian River County IG Center
description: Come play pickleball at Indian River County IG Center in Vero Beach, FL! There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts cannot be reserved. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, lights, and trainers or lessons.
fees: Fee required — $5 per session or you may purchase a punch card which includes a small discount.

name: John's Island
description: John's Island is a place to play pickleball in Indian River Shores, FL. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Pocahontas Park
description: Pocahontas Park is a place to play pickleball in Vero Beach, FL. There are 12 outdoor hard and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, and trainers or lessons. A one-time fee is required to play.
open_play_schedule: Every day from 8:00 AM to 9:00 PM
fees: Fee required — Drop-in fee is $10 per day.  If you wish to become a member of Pickleball University, e-mail play@pickleu.com and you will be placed on a waitlist.

name: Schumann Drive Park
description: Come play pickleball at Schumann Drive Park in Sebastian, FL! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Sebastian Pickleball Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Sebastian Pickleball Complex in Sebastian, FL! There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: South County Regional Park
description: South County Regional Park is a place to play pickleball in Vero Beach, FL. There are 12 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: South Mainland Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at South Mainland Community Center in Sebastian, FL! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Vero Fitness
description: Indoor air conditioned facility with ceiling fans, a rubberized playing surface and great  lighting. Everyone is welcome and players are grouped by ability.

name: Vista Royale
description: Vista Royale is a place to play pickleball in Vero Beach, FL. There are 6 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. Reservations are not available. Amenities include lights.

name: Whispering Palms Mhc And Rv Resort
description: Whispering Palms Mhc And Rv Resort is a place to play pickleball in Sebastian, FL. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play.
